title: Pune、Maharashtra — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Pune、Maharashtra的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Pune是Maharashtra的一个城市，人口约6,200,000。A major educational and IT hub known as the ‘Oxford of the East,’ with a pleasant climate, historic landmarks, and a growing startup scene.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
